meta.description: A declared dependency on a UUID from outside the item graph.

targetId.description: UUID of the item being referenced.

kind.description: Nature of the reference. Known values: physical, external, function-arg, function-output, component-dep. Free-form string — new kinds do not require a spec change.

medium.description: For physical kind: engraved, printed, qr-code, label, published-doc. Free-form.

location.description: Human-readable description of where this reference exists (e.g. "Workshop bay 3, nameplate").

url.description: For webhook kind: the endpoint URL. Use $VAR for secrets.

blockDeletion.description: When true, deletion of targetId is blocked until this reference item is removed. Default: false.

removable.description: Whether this reference can be removed. False for physical engravings that cannot be undone. Informational — does not enforce system behaviour.

description.description: Free-form human explanation of this reference and its implications.

sqlSchema: -- Built-in type: adapter handles storage natively.
